config.script:
"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 12/05/2024
		Purpose: Reset all values.
	"""
	# Write your script here	
	system.perspective.closeDock('rightP')
	system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
	headerLabel = "Add"
	messageType = 'OPCodePanel'
	payload = {'UnitId':'','headerLabel':headerLabel,'ModelId':-1,'AreaId':-1,'LineId':-1,
					'WorkStationId':-1,'OPDefinitionId':-1,'WITypeId':-1,'OPCode':'',
					'Description':'','AttributeText':'','ImageName':'','ImagePath':'','isActive':int(1),'MarriagePart':-1,
					'ToolId':'','ProgramId':'','IsMinMaxReq':-1,'MaxVal':'','MinVal':'',"Action":Action,"Part":-1,"BOMId":-1,'Quantity':''}	 			
	system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page' )

"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 12/05/2024
		Purpose: Reset all values. 
	"""
	# Write your script here	
	system.perspective.closeDock('rightP')
	system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
	headerLabel = "Add"
	messageType = 'OPCodePanel'
	payload = {'UnitId':'','headerLabel':headerLabel,'ModelId':-1,'AreaId':-1,'LineId':-1,
					'WorkStationId':-1,'OPDefinitionId':-1,'WITypeId':-1,'OPCode':'',
					'Description':'','AttributeText':'','ImageName':'','ImagePath':'','isActive':int(1),'MarriagePart':-1,
					'ToolId':'','ProgramId':'','IsMinMaxReq':-1,'MaxVal':'','MinVal':'',"Action":Action,'Part':-1,'BOMId':-1,'Quantity':''}		 			
	system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page' )

"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 12/05/2024
		Purpose: Add/update values in DB. 
	"""
	import re
	try:
		UnitId = self.view.custom.UnitId
		headerLabel = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntHeader").getChild("lblHeader").props.text
		system.perspective.print("headerLabel:%s"%headerLabel)
		ModelId = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntModel").getChild("drpModel").props.value
		AreaId = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntArea").getChild("drpArea").props.value
		LineId = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntLine").getChild("drpLine").props.value
		WorkStationId = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntWorkStation").getChild("drpWorkStation").props.value
		OPDefinitionId = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntOPDefinition").getChild("drpOPDefinition").props.value
		WITypeId = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntWIType").getChild("drpWIType").props.value
		OPCode = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntOPCode").getChild("txt").props.text
		Desc = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntDescription").getChild("txt").props.text
		AttributeText = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntAttributeTxt").getChild("txt").props.text
		ImagePath = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntMAPImage").getChild("imgStep").props.source
		ImageName = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntMAPImage").getChild("ImageName").props.text
		ToolId = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntOPdefType").getChild("txtToolId").props.text
		ProgramId = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntOPdefType").getChild("txtProgramId").props.text
		MinVal = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntOPdefType").getChild("txtMinVal").props.text
		MaxVal = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntOPdefType").getChild("txtMaxVal").props.text
		IsMinMaxReq = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntOPdefType").getChild("cntIsMinMaxReq").getChild("drpIsMinMaxReq").props.value
		Part = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntMAPPart").getChild("drpPart").props.value
		BOM = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntMAPPart").getChild("drpbom").props.value
		system.perspective.print("ImagePath")
		system.perspective.print(ImagePath)
		IsActive = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntIsActive").getChild("drpIsActive").props.value
		Quantity = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntOPdefType").getChild("txtTorqueQuantity").props.text
		MarriagePart = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntMAPPart").getChild("Checkbox").props.selected
		if MarriagePart:
			MarriagePart = 1
		else:
			MarriagePart = 0
#		system.perspective.print("Add Values:%s"%(Header,UnitName,UnitDesc,UnitLevel,AttachedTo,IsActive,WorkStationType,IPaddress))
		CurrentUserId=self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
		next = 0
		if(AreaId != -1 and LineId != -1 and ModelId != -1 and WorkStationId != -1 and OPDefinitionId!=-1 and WITypeId!=-1 and OPCode!=-1):
		
			params = {"Name":OPCode,'AreaId':AreaId, 'LineId':LineId,'WorkStationId':WorkStationId,'modelId':ModelId,'OPDefinitionId':OPDefinitionId}
			val = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Master/OPCodeConfiguration/GetCount_ByName",params)
			pyval = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(val)
			for row in pyval:
				cntStep = row['cnt']
			params = {"OPCode":UnitId}
			cntWI = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Master/OPCodeConfiguration/Get_WICountbyOPCodeName",params)
			pycntWI = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(cntWI)
			for i in pycntWI:
				count=i['Count']
			system.perspective.print("WI Count ag OPcode")
			system.perspective.print(count)
			if cntStep>=1 and headerLabel!='Edit':
				next = 0
				state = 'Warning'
				message = "OPCode already exist."
			elif count > 0 and headerLabel=='Edit' and IsActive==0:
				next = 0
				state = 'Warning'
				message = "Can not deactivate this OPCode. It is assigned to work instruction."
			elif (WITypeId==int(2) or WITypeId==int(3)) and ImagePath=="":
				next = 0
				state = 'Warning'
				message = "Please add image."
			elif (WITypeId==int(1) or WITypeId==int(3)) and AttributeText=="":
				next = 0
				state = 'Warning'
				message = "Please add AttributeText. It cannot be empty."
			else:
				next = 1
		if(next ==1):
			system.perspective.print("OP Start")
			if str(headerLabel) == 'Add':
				Id=0
				system.perspective.print("Add OP Start")
				params = {"ModelId":ModelId,"AreaId":AreaId,"LineId":LineId,"WorkstationId":WorkStationId,"OPDefinitionId":OPDefinitionId,
				"WITypeId":WITypeId,"OPCode":OPCode,"Description":Desc,"AttributeText":AttributeText,"ImagePath":ImagePath,
				"ImageName":ImageName,"CreatedBy":CurrentUserId,"OPCodeId":UnitId,"ToolId":ToolId,"ProgramId":ProgramId,
				"IsMinMaxReq":IsMinMaxReq,"MaxVal":MaxVal,"MinVal":MinVal,"BomId":BOM,"PartId":Part,"Quantity":Quantity,"MarriagePart":MarriagePart}
				res = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Master/OPCodeConfiguration/InsertOPCode",params)
				pydata = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(res)
				if(len(pydata) > 0):
					for rows in range(len(pydata)):
						result = pydata[rows]['Result']
				if int(result) > 0:		
					state = 'success'
					message = "Record added successfully"
					auditMsg=message + " with OPCODE=" + str(OPCode) + ",ModelID=" + str(ModelId) + ",LineID=" + str(LineId) + ",WorkstationID=" + str(WorkStationId) + ",OPdefinationID=" + str(OPDefinitionId)
					
				else:
				    state = 'error'
				    message = "Record not added. Please contact system administrator."
			else:
				Id=self.view.custom.UnitId
				system.perspective.print("Edit OP Start")
				params = {"ModelId":ModelId,"AreaId":AreaId,"LineId":LineId,"WorkstationId":WorkStationId,"OPDefinitionId":OPDefinitionId,
				"WITypeId":WITypeId,"OPCode":OPCode,"Description":Desc,"AttributeText":AttributeText,"ImagePath":ImagePath,
				"ImageName":ImageName,"ModifiedBy":CurrentUserId,"OPCodeId":UnitId,"ToolId":ToolId,"ProgramId":ProgramId,
				"IsMinMaxReq":IsMinMaxReq,"MaxVal":MaxVal,"MinVal":MinVal,"IsActive":IsActive,"BomId":BOM,"PartId":Part,'Quantity':Quantity,
				"MarriagePart":MarriagePart}
				system.perspective.print(params)
				result = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Master/OPCodeConfiguration/UpdateOPCode",params)
				if int(result) > 0:
					state = 'success'
					message = "Record updated successfully."
					auditMsg=message 
				else:
				    state = 'error'
				    message = "Record not updated. Please contact system administrator."
			    
			if(str(result) > '0'):
				system.perspective.print("Result")
				system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
			
				messageType = 'tableRefresh'    	 			
				system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType,scope = 'page' )
			
				system.perspective.sendMessage("tableRow",payload = {"Index":-1}, scope = "page")	
				system.perspective.sendMessage("deleteIsVisible",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")	
				system.perspective.sendMessage("isEditDisplay",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")	
		Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
		
		#addToAuditLogStrat
		system.perspective.print(auditMsg)
		category='Master Configuration'
		subCategory='OPCode Configuration'
		if(Id!=0):
			prevDesc=self.view.getChild("root").custom.payload
			#curDesc={"linetypecode":LineTypeCode, "mode":mode, "isActive":isActive, "Code":bomId }
			curDesc = {
				"ModelId":ModelId,
				"AreaId":AreaId,
				"LineId":LineId,
				"WorkStationId":WorkStationId,
				"OPDefinitionId":OPDefinitionId,
				"WITypeId":WITypeId,
				"OPCode":OPCode,
				"Description":Desc,
				"AttributeText":AttributeText,
				"ImagePath":ImagePath,
				"ImageName":ImageName,
				"ToolId":ToolId,
				"ProgramId":ProgramId,
				"MinVal":MinVal,
				"MaxVal":MaxVal,
				"IsMinMaxReq":IsMinMaxReq,
				"Part":Part,
				"BOMId":BOM,
				"isActive":IsActive
			}
			system.perspective.print(prevDesc)
			system.perspective.print(curDesc)
			description=str(auditMsg)+" Where ID="+str(Id)+" With Previous Data->"+str(prevDesc)+" and Updated Data->"+str(curDesc)
		else:
			description=str(auditMsg)
		createdBy=self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddAuditLogs(category, subCategory, description, createdBy)
		#addAuditLogEnd
		
	except:
		message = "Something went wrong.Please contact System Adminstration"
		state = "error"
		Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")	
		screenName ='OPCode Configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Pannel/OPCode Pannel')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onActionPerformed -> cntSave/btn_Save')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
	#End of except block

messageHandlers.script:
# implement your handler here
	load=payload.copy()
	#system.perspective.print("Printing payload of msg handler----------->")
	#system.perspective.print(payload)
	load.pop('headerLabel')
	load.pop('UnitId')
	
	#system.perspective.print("msg handler1----------->")
	import json
	load_json = json.dumps(load)
	self.view.getChild("root").custom.payload=load_json
	#system.perspective.print("msg handler2----------->")
	#system.perspective.print("payload msghandler3------------->")
	#system.perspective.print(self.view.getChild("root").custom.payload)

config.script:
"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 12/05/2024
		Purpose: Reset area, line and workstation values. 
	"""
	self.parent.parent.getChild("cntArea").getChild("drpArea").props.value = -1
	self.parent.parent.getChild("cntLine").getChild("drpLine").props.value =-1
	self.parent.parent.getChild("cntWorkStation").getChild("drpWorkStation").props.value = -1

onChange.script:
#	try:
#		if int(self.props.text) > 0:
#			self.props.text = self.props.text
#			self.props.style.backgroundColor = '#FFFFFF'
#	except:
#		if self.props.text == '':
#			self.props.style.backgroundColor = '#FFFFFF'
#		else:
#			self.props.text = self.props.text
#			self.props.style.backgroundColor = '#FF8A8A'
	"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 04/09/2024
		Purpose: Check Special character in text. 
	"""
	import re
	 
	def contains_special_characters(input_string):
	    # Define a regex pattern for special characters
	    pattern = r'[^0-9]'
	    
	    # Search for special characters
	    if re.search(pattern, input_string):
	        return True
	    else:
	        return False
	 
	# Calling Special Character Check Function
	input_string = self.props.text
	if contains_special_characters(input_string):
	    self.props.text = str(self.props.text)[:-1]

"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 04/09/2024
		Purpose: Check Special character in text. 
	"""
	import re
	 
	def contains_special_characters(input_string):
	    # Define a regex pattern for special characters
	    pattern = r'[^a-zA-Z0-9 -_]'
	    
	    # Search for special characters
	    if re.search(pattern, input_string):
	        return True
	    else:
	        return False
	 
	# Calling Special Character Check Function
	input_string = self.props.text
	if contains_special_characters(input_string):
	    self.props.text = str(self.props.text)[:-1]

config.script:
"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 12/05/2024
		Purpose: Open popup to bind image for selected OPCode. 
	"""
	# Write your script here
	try:
	#Start of try block	
		WSId = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntWorkStation").getChild("drpWorkStation").props.value		
		header = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntHeader").getChild("lblHeader").props.text
		if(str(header) == 'Add'):
			imageURL = '/system/images/VECV/icon_User-profile.png'
		else:
			imageId = self.view.custom.imageId
			if(int(imageId) == -1):
				imageURL = '/system/images/VECV/icon_User-profile.png'
			else:
				self.view.custom.selectedImageId=int(imageId)
				imageURL=self.view.custom.imageURL
	
		imageTypeId = 0
		header='OP Code Definition - '+str(self.parent.parent.getChild("cntOPCode").getChild("txt").props.text)     
		params = {"isVisible":1,"WorkStationId":WSId,"imageTypeId":int(imageTypeId),'imageURL':imageURL,'header':str(header)}
		system.perspective.openPopup('addImage','Project_VECV/PopUp/AddImage',params,showCloseIcon=False)	
		system.perspective.closeDock('rightp')
	#End of try block		
	except: 
	#Start of except block  
		screenName ='OPCode configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Pannel/OPCodePanel')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onActionPerformed  -> cntImage/cntMAPImage/btn_Image')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())  
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)
	#End of except block

messageHandlers.script:
"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 12/05/2024
		Purpose: Insert row data into panel fields. 
	"""
	# implement your handler here
	system.perspective.print("payload%s"%payload)
	self.view.custom.UnitId = payload['UnitId']
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntHeader").getChild("lblHeader").props.text=payload['headerLabel']
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntModel").getChild("drpModel").props.value=payload['ModelId']
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntArea").getChild("drpArea").props.value=payload['AreaId']
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntLine").getChild("drpLine").props.value=payload['LineId']
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntWorkStation").getChild("drpWorkStation").props.value=payload['WorkStationId']
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntOPDefinition").getChild("drpOPDefinition").props.value=payload['OPDefinitionId']
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntWIType").getChild("drpWIType").props.value=payload['WITypeId']
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntOPCode").getChild("txt").props.text=payload['OPCode']
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntDescription").getChild("txt").props.text=payload['Description']
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntAttributeTxt").getChild("txt").props.text=payload['AttributeText']
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntMAPImage").getChild("ImageName").props.text=payload['ImageName']
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntMAPImage").getChild("imgStep").props.source=payload['ImagePath']
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntIsActive").getChild("drpIsActive").props.value=payload['isActive']
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntOPdefType").getChild("txtToolId").props.text=payload['ToolId']
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntOPdefType").getChild("txtProgramId").props.text=payload['ProgramId']
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntOPdefType").getChild("cntIsMinMaxReq").getChild("drpIsMinMaxReq").props.value=payload['IsMinMaxReq']
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntOPdefType").getChild("txtMaxVal").props.text=payload['MaxVal']
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntOPdefType").getChild("txtMinVal").props.text=payload['MinVal']
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntOPdefType").getChild("txtTorqueQuantity").props.text=payload["Quantity"]
	system.perspective.print("OPCodePanel--PartId:%s"%str(payload['Part']))
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntMAPPart").getChild("drpPart").props.value=payload['Part']
	system.perspective.print("OPCodePanel--BOMId:%s"%str(payload['BOMId']))
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntMAPPart").getChild("drpbom").props.value=payload['BOMId']
	if str(payload['MarriagePart']) == '1':
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntMAPPart").getChild("Checkbox").props.selected = True
	else:
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntMAPPart").getChild("Checkbox").props.selected = False

"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 12/05/2024
		Purpose: Move selected image data into custom params. 
	"""
	# implement your handler here
	try:
	#Start of try block
		self.view.custom.selectedImageId = payload['selectedImageId']
		self.view.custom.imageURL=payload['imageURL']
		self.view.custom.imagename=payload['imagename']
	#End of try block
	except: 
	#Start of except block  
		screenName ='OPCode configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Pannel/OPCodePanel')  
		errorFunction = str('Message Handler:getSelectedImageId -> root')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())  
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)
	#End of except block
